data.content: /gsd-execute-phase use @.planning\phases\15-update-the-design-of-the-webui-accordingly\15-UI-SPEC.md and mainly @DESIGN.md for website design. Also use skills for more sophisticated help

I’m starting the phase execution flow now using the `gsd-execute-phase` skill, then I’ll load the phase plans and dependencies for phase 15 and run the workflow end-to-end with your design references as primary inputs.
I’ve loaded the skill definition; next I’m reading the canonical execute workflow and phase-15 artifacts so I can apply the exact gates and wave logic before making any code edits.

I’ve confirmed phase 15 has one completed summary and three incomplete plans; I’m now loading the required GSD state/gate references plus the remaining plan files so execution can proceed safely in the right order.
I’m loading the frontend-focused skills now so the upcoming implementation follows their higher-quality UI and React/Next guidance while executing plans 15-02 through 15-04.
Next I’m inspecting the current web UI files targeted by plans 15-02 to 15-04 so I can apply only the missing deltas and preserve existing completed plan-01 work.
I found that `navbar.tsx` and `repo/[id]/layout.tsx` don’t exist yet, so I’ll create them and refactor the current repo page to use the new shared shell while keeping SSE chat behavior intact.
I’m checking existing repo subpages and theme utilities next, so the new shared layout won’t conflict with current routes and the navbar/theme toggle integration stays consistent.

I’ve mapped the current UI state and confirmed phase 15 work is partially implemented; next I’ll execute the remaining plan tasks in order and then update phase artifacts (`SUMMARY`, state, roadmap progress).
Before editing, I’m checking current git changes so I only touch phase-15 target files and don’t interfere with unrelated work in this dirty tree.

+import { Button as ButtonPrimitive } from "@base-ui/react/button";
+import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
+
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+const buttonVariants = cva(
+  "group/button inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-[0.5rem] border border-transparent text-[var(--text-sm)] font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-[background-color,border-color,color,box-shadow,transform] duration-150 outline-none select-none focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-[var(--brand-glow)] active:not-aria-[haspopup]:translate-y-px disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
+  {
+    variants: {
+      variant: {
+        default:
+          "bg-[var(--brand)] text-[var(--primary-foreground)] shadow-[0_0_0_1px_var(--brand-muted)] hover:bg-[var(--brand-hover)] hover:shadow-[0_0_0_1px_var(--brand-muted),0_0_28px_var(--brand-glow)]",
+        outline:
+          "border-[var(--border)] bg-transparent text-[var(--foreground)] hover:border-[var(--border-strong)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-2)]",
+        secondary:
+          "bg-[var(--surface-2)] text-[var(--foreground)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-3)]",
+        ghost: "text-[var(--foreground-muted)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-2)] hover:text-[var(--foreground)]",
+        destructive:
+          "bg-[var(--accent-rose-muted)] text-[var(--accent-rose)] hover:bg-[color-mix(in_oklab,var(--accent-rose-muted)_70%,var(--accent-rose)_30%)]",
+        link: "border-transparent bg-transparent p-0 text-[var(--brand)] underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
+      },
+      size: {
+        default: "h-11 gap-2 px-4 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-3 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-3",
+        xs: "h-8 gap-1.5 rounded-[0.4rem] px-2.5 text-[var(--text-xs)] [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
+        sm: "h-9 gap-1.5 rounded-[0.45rem] px-3 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3.5",
+        lg: "h-[52px] gap-2 px-6 text-[var(--text-body)]",
+        icon: "size-11",
+        "icon-xs": "size-8 rounded-[0.4rem] [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
+        "icon-sm": "size-9 rounded-[0.45rem]",
+        "icon-lg": "size-[52px]",
+      },
+    },
+    defaultVariants: {
+      variant: "default",
+      size: "default",
+    },
+  }
+);
@@
 function Button({
   className,
   variant = "default",
   size = "default",
   ...props
 }: ButtonPrimitive.Props & VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>) {
   return (
     <ButtonPrimitive
       data-slot="button"
       className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
       {...props}
     />
-  )
+  );
 }
 
-export { Button }
+export { Button };
*** End Patch"}
